name: intelligent_text_processor
description: Combines OCR error correction, text validation, and smart dictionary lookup. Fixes common errors like | → I, 0 → O, rn → m. Essential for parallel processing. Replaces text_validator plugin.
author: OptikR Team

enable_corrections.description: Enable OCR error correction (| → I, 0 → O, rn → m, etc.)

enable_context.description: Enable context-aware corrections using surrounding text

enable_validation.description: Enable text validation to filter out low-confidence OCR garbage

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for text validation (0.0-1.0)

min_word_length.description: Minimum text length to keep (single valid letters like I, A are always allowed)

auto_learn.description: Automatically learn new corrections from validated text
